title: Stacked-column note
html:
Stacked-column note

Stub. Yahir's recurring note-taking form — date headers stacked vertically with bullet sub-lists for life logistics, business todos, relationships, and financial juggling, all in one running document. Sibling to note as letter to self as one of his stylistic fingerprints. The densest example is 2025 05 30 todos (~10 months of external working memory in one file).

Source summaries

  • note as letter to self
  • 2025 05 30 todos
  • 2024 10 22 valeria visit

related.label: Todos — Austin move + Brotein launch + summer 2025 planning
Valeria visit — Shanghai itinerary + China econ note
